items.title: Budget 2025 — revised new-regime slabs
items.summary: Finance Bill 2025 expands the new-regime rebate so no tax is payable up to ₹12L taxable income (₹12.75L with standard deduction). Slabs restructured to 7 bands from 0% to 30%.

items.title: Standard deduction raised to ₹75,000 (new regime)
items.summary: Standard deduction in the new tax regime raised from ₹50,000 to ₹75,000 for salaried individuals.

items.title: 2025 inflation-adjusted tax brackets published
items.summary: IRS Rev. Proc. 2024-40 details 2025 brackets, standard deduction ($15k / $30k), and gift-tax exclusion ($19k).

items.title: SS wage base raised to $176,100 for 2025
items.summary: Social Security taxable maximum increases from $168,600 (2024) to $176,100 (2025).

items.title: Domestic Minimum Top-up Tax from Jan 2025
items.summary: UAE introduces a 15% Domestic Minimum Top-up Tax for multinational groups with global revenues ≥ €750M, effective financial years starting 1 Jan 2025.

items.title: Gradual increase in GOSI contributions (Saudis)
items.summary: Stepped GOSI contribution rate increases for new Saudi entrants starting 2025 under the revised Social Insurance Law.

items.title: Top bracket threshold adjusted
items.summary: Law amending Law 91/2005 raises the threshold for the top 27.5% bracket and adjusts personal exemption guidance.
